assessor_1_raw:
## Independent Assessment 1 (Run 3): Transformer vs. GBM for Credit Card Charge-Off

Comprehensive design with six confound controls. Temporal split, equal tuning, AUPRC primary. No violations.

Verdict: defense_wins
assessor_2_raw:
## Independent Assessment 2 (Run 3): Transformer vs. GBM for Credit Card Charge-Off

Sound design. Pre-specified sensitivity analysis. Missingness indicators for both models. Single-use test set. No violations.

Verdict: defense_wins
assessor_3_raw:
## Independent Assessment 3 (Run 3): Transformer vs. GBM for Credit Card Charge-Off

Strong design throughout. Macro stratification for economic cycle effects. Calibration as secondary metric. No violations.

Verdict: defense_wins
adjudication_raw:
## Ensemble Synthesis (Run 3): eval_scenario_13

All three: defense_wins. Unanimous across all runs.

Verdict: defense_wins
